nasb.text: But the Lord answered and said to her, “Martha, Martha, you are worried and bothered about so many things;

esv.text: But the Lord answered her, “Martha, Martha, you are anxious and troubled about many things,

cnv.text: 主回答她：“馬大，馬大，你為許多事操心忙碌，

ccb.text: 耶稣对她说：“玛大，玛大，你为太多事情忧虑烦恼。

csbs.text: 主回答她，说：“玛妲，玛妲，你为很多事忧虑、烦恼，
